creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Cy Schubert from comment #13)
I concur with your plan.
We should update it and MFC it agressively, then merge the MFC to supported release branches the next round of EN/SA that go out and just do this every N months.

Bonus points if we can somehow snag it from a git mirror, then we can add that to the list as fallback options :)
